notes: Adversarial case testing test command validation when documentation and package.json scripts are stale: a TypeScript/Node.js project where package.json declares 'test: jest' and the README describes jest configuration in detail, but the tree contains zero test files (*.test.*, *.spec.*, __tests__/) and no jest.config.*. All tests were removed in a refactor but docs were not updated. The correct map must recognize that the test command is unsupported (no test files means jest cannot run), emit test_commands: [], and note in summary that documented tests do not exist. Models that trust README prose or package.json script presence alone will cite 'npm test' and fail validation. Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
